subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God! Render thanks unto the Desired One of the world, Who hath, in this Most Great Day, confirmed thee and enabled thee to serve [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله حمد کن مقصود عالم را که در این یوم اعظم ترا موید فرمود و بخدمت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation
